nasb.text: and you shall prepare wine for the drink offering, one-fourth of a hin, with the burnt offering or for the sacrifice, for each lamb.

esv.text: and you shall offer with the burnt offering, or for the sacrifice, a quarter of a hin of wine for the drink offering for each lamb.

cnv.text: 此外，無論是燔祭或是別的祭，為每隻綿羊羔你要一同獻上一公升作奠祭的酒。

ccb.text: 无论燔祭还是平安祭，每献一只羊羔，要同时献上一升酒作奠祭；
